name: GER40 M15 Donchian Trend Breakout
hypothesis: GER40 M15 trends intraday during European cash session. A 20-bar Donchian breakout filtered by EMA50>EMA200 trend alignment and ADX>=20 regime captures directional continuation with edge above costs. Falsified if PF<1.7 or trade count<200 over 2 years.

entry_rules.long: close > donchian_high_20_prev AND ema50 > ema200 AND adx14 >= 20
entry_rules.short: close < donchian_low_20_prev AND ema50 < ema200 AND adx14 >= 20

regime_filter.rationale: Donchian breakouts require trending regime; filter both dead and parabolic vol.

notes: Inspired by DAX10 Market Mafia pine (inspiration only). Uses trend+vol regime gate; no pyramiding in v1.
